# YepIts.ai

> YepIts.ai is an AI-powered YouTube video summarizer that turns long videos into concise, accurate summaries. Get the key points of any video in seconds — transcripts, chapters, timestamps, and exportable summaries. Free tier: 3 summaries/day for videos up to 15 minutes. Pro tier: $7/month for unlimited summaries with no length restrictions.

## Product Pages

- [YepIts.ai Homepage](https://yepits.ai/) — AI YouTube video summarizer
- [Pricing](https://yepits.ai/#pricing) — Free and Pro ($7/mo) plans
- [Chrome Extension](https://yepits.ai/extension) — Summarize videos directly from YouTube
- [Sign Up](https://yepits.ai/signup) — Create a free account

## Blog

- [YepIts.ai Blog](https://yepits.ai/blog) — Tips, tutorials, and updates on AI video summarization

## FAQ

- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://yepits.ai/#faq) — Pricing, accuracy, languages, privacy, and more

## Documentation

- [How It Works](https://yepits.ai/#how-it-works) — Upload a URL, get a summary in seconds
- [Privacy Policy](https://yepits.ai/privacy) — How we handle your data
- [Terms of Service](https://yepits.ai/terms) — Usage terms and conditions
